title: My Priorities | Anna Dixon MP for Shipley

My priorities for Shipley Revitalise our high streets, creating good jobs for local people End sewage dumping in the River Aire and Wharfe A local NHS dentist when you need it and more care in the community Neighbourhood police and crack down on anti-social behaviour More money for our local schools and mental health hubs What else I'm working on © 2024 by Office of Anna Dixon MP.
